rationale: Educ. Code §29.059 governs inter-district cooperation for bilingual education programs. It has no operative connection to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district may join with one or more other districts to provide the bilingual education and special language programs required by this subchapter.
_note: No textual or fiscal linkage between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
